name: Islem KOBBI
title: PhD Researcher | Mid-to-Mid Motion Planning | Self-Play RL
heroSubtitle: Self-Play Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
bio: I build mid-to-mid motion planners for autonomous vehicles, training policies through self-play reinforcement learning and validating them across closed maps, CARLA, PufferDrive, and Waymo-style urban scenarios.
